title: indigofera trifoliata var. duthiei
intro: Indigofera trifoliata var. duthiei is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae and is commonly known as the Himalayan indigo. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Indigofera trifoliata var. duthiei include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
